bird.name: Cuban solitaire
bird.summary: The Cuban solitaire (Myadestes elisabeth), also known as the Cuban nightingale, is a species of bird in the family Turdidae, the thrushes.…

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

relations.subject: Cuban solitaire
relations.evidence: It inhabits pine, semi-deciduous, and evergreen forest in the hills and mountains.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C
